es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas por inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: Amper Music, una empresa de música que utiliza inteligencia artificial para crear música, ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias que permite a los productores y artistas utilizar sus obras de AI en sus proyectos. Esta plataforma es la primera en su tipo y busca proporcionar una solución clara y transparente para la licencia de obras de AI.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Si eres un artista o productor que utiliza inteligencia artificial para crear música, es importante que registres tus obras para proteger tus derechos de autor. Puedes hacerlo a través de la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos o de la entidad correspondiente en tu país. Asegúrate de proporcionar toda la información necesaria, incluyendo la descripción de la obra, el nombre del autor y la fecha de creación.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created by artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has sparked a significant debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Google and Amazon have also been affected, as they have been investing heavily in AI-generated music.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Amper Music, a music company that uses artificial intelligence to create music, has launched a licensing platform that allows producers and artists to use their AI-generated works in their projects. This platform is the first of its kind and aims to provide a clear and transparent solution for licensing AI-generated music. The platform has already gained attention from major music industry players, including Universal Music Group and Sony Music.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: If you're an artist or producer who uses artificial intelligence to create music, it's essential to register your works to protect your copyright. You can do this through the US Copyright Office or the relevant entity in your country. Make sure to provide all necessary information, including a description of the work, the author's name, and the date of creation. Additionally, consider using a platform like Amper Music's licensing platform to ensure that your AI-generated works are properly licensed and protected.
